title: Coinbase Analyst Expectations and Stock Analysis
text: 28 analysts covering Coinbase stock have consensus rating of Buy with average price target of $304.12, forecasting 49.72% increase in stock price over next year. Specific breakdown shows 52% recommend Strong Buy, 22% recommend Buy, 19% suggest Holding, 4% advise Selling, and 4% predict Strong Sell. Q2 guidance for Coinbase calls for $565-645 million in Subscription and Services revenue, with about $215 million in transaction revenue already captured through May 5, 2026. JPMorgan lifted COIN price target to $290 from $252 with Overweight call. Benchmark bumped its target to $270 and talks about Coinbase as an everything exchange. Deutsche Bank, Oppenheimer, and President Capital all keep Buy or Overweight ratings. Majority of analysts lean bullish with Coinbase considered a Moderate Buy due to strong performance history, solid position in cryptocurrency market, and growth potential from expanding role in stablecoins, particularly USDC.
